assumptions: The intragroup dividend has already created a recognized intragroup monetary receivable/payable between group entities with different functional currencies.
The related foreign exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation and can affect consolidated profit or loss.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognized intragroup monetary item can be designated for foreign currency risk in consolidation under the intragroup monetary item exception.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 also provides a cash flow hedge model for foreign currency risk associated with a recognized asset or liability that could affect profit or loss.
